name: Room rent sub-limit impact explanation
description: Explain how room rent sub-limits affect claim reimbursement — proportionate deduction

input.message: My policy says room rent limit is 1% of sum insured. My sum insured is ₹5 lakh. I stayed in a room at ₹6,000/day. Will I get full claim?

expected_response_criteria.notes: Room rent limit = 1% of ₹5L = ₹5,000/day. Actual = ₹6,000. Proportionate deduction applies to all claims, not just room rent.
